title: Dhammapada, Chapter 13: The World
description: Chapter 13 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.
introduction: Chapter 13 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.

text: Do not follow the ways of the world. Do not live heedlessly. Do not follow false doctrines. Do not linger in the world.
